subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #057 The Causes of the Differences in Human Character
subcodes.first_line: There is the innate character, the inherited character, and the acquired character, which is gained through education.
subcodes.first_line_orig: اخلاق فطری و اخلاق ارثی و اخلاق اکتسابی که بتربیت حاصل گردد
subcodes.subjects: @differences in human capacity, @lying and deceit, @education of children; moral education, @nonexistence of evil; relativity of good and evil
